svg.title: M-Pesa Fraud Detection Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing data ingestion via Kafka, feature engineering, ML training with MLflow, FastAPI serving, Streamlit dashboard, monitoring with drift detection, and CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the M-Pesa Kafka producer work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Kafka consumer do?')
sendPrompt('What is the raw_transactions table?')

g.text: Python modules, writes to features table

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the temporal features in the fraud model?')
sendPrompt('What are the velocity features in the fraud model?')
sendPrompt('What are the amount features in the fraud model?')
sendPrompt('What are the behavioral features in the fraud model?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the frauddb PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('How does the ML training pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does the MLflow model registry work?')

g.text: Uvicorn, API key auth (X-API-Key), latency tracking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the /predict endpoint do?')
sendPrompt('What does the /metrics endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('What does the /health endpoint do?')
sendPrompt('What does the /model-info endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI JSON logging work?')
sendPrompt('What pages does the Streamlit dashboard have?')
sendPrompt('How does the drift detection monitoring work?')
sendPrompt('How does the automated retraining trigger work?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Docker CD pipeline work?')
